title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon, an AI coding automation framework, is extended with a Jira adapter that triggers AI workflows from issue tickets. Each Jira ticket gets a dedicated conversation context with Archon, enabling automated bug fixes and pull request generation directly from issue tracking.
